import importlib.util, os, platform

if _sdk_spec and _sdk_spec.origin:
    p = os.path.join\(os.path.dirname\(_sdk_spec.origin\), '_bundled', _cli_name\)

else:
    print\('claude_agent_sdk not found'\)
")

Bash(cat > /tmp/create_ls_cert2.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
CERT_NAME="LyricStudio"
KEY_FILE="/tmp/ls_key.pem"
CERT_FILE="/tmp/ls_cert.pem"
P12_FILE="/tmp/ls_cert.p12"
PASSPHRASE="lyricsigning"

# Config with Code Signing EKU
OPENSSL_CONF=$\(mktemp /tmp/ls_ssl_XXXXXX.cnf\)
cat > "$OPENSSL_CONF" << 'EOF'
[req]
distinguished_name = dn
x509_extensions    = ext
prompt             = no
[dn]
CN = LyricStudio
[ext]
basicConstraints     = CA:FALSE
keyUsage             = critical, digitalSignature
extendedKeyUsage     = critical, codeSigning
subjectKeyIdentifier = hash
EOF

openssl req -new -x509 -days 3650 -nodes \\
    -newkey rsa:2048 \\
    -config "$OPENSSL_CONF" \\
    -keyout "$KEY_FILE" \\
    -out "$CERT_FILE" 2>/dev/null

# PKCS12 with a real passphrase
openssl pkcs12 -export \\
    -out "$P12_FILE" \\
    -inkey "$KEY_FILE" \\
    -in "$CERT_FILE" \\
    -passout "pass:${PASSPHRASE}" 2>/dev/null

# Import into login keychain
security import "$P12_FILE" \\
    -k ~/Library/Keychains/login.keychain-db \\
    -P "$PASSPHRASE" \\
    -T /usr/bin/codesign \\
    -f pkcs12 && echo "Import OK" || echo "Import FAILED"

# Trust cert for code signing
security add-trusted-cert \\
    -d -r trustRoot \\
    -k ~/Library/Keychains/login.keychain-db \\
    "$CERT_FILE" && echo "Trust OK" || echo "Trust FAILED"

rm -f "$KEY_FILE" "$CERT_FILE" "$P12_FILE" "$OPENSSL_CONF"
SCRIPT
bash /tmp/create_ls_cert2.sh)
